inputs.label: Total Runs Scored
inputs.businessContext: Runs scored by the team in the tournament.

businessContext_i18n.en: Runs scored by the team in the tournament.

inputs.label: Overs Faced
inputs.businessContext: Total overs faced by the team, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 50.3 for 50 overs and 3 balls).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total overs faced by the team, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 50.3 for 50 overs and 3 balls).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Takımın karşılaştığı toplam over sayısı, ondalık olarak ifade edilir (örneğin, 50 over ve 3 top için 50.3).

inputs.label: Total Runs Conceded
inputs.businessContext: Runs conceded by the team in the tournament.

businessContext_i18n.en: Runs conceded by the team in the tournament.

inputs.label: Overs Bowled
inputs.businessContext: Total overs bowled by the team, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 50.3 for 50 overs and 3 balls).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total overs bowled by the team, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 50.3 for 50 overs and 3 balls).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Takımın attığı toplam over, ondalık olarak ifade edilir (ör. 50.3, 50 over ve 3 top).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
